glossary_surface_consistency: PASS — 9/9 spot-checked terms match glossary ZH

findings.description: All 3 questions on p331 have empty answer and explanation fields in all 3 languages (jp/zh/en). 18 missing fields total.
findings.detail: question.answer.{jp,zh,en} and question.explanation.{jp,zh,en} are empty strings for q::p331::0, q::p331::1, q::p331::2.
findings.action: Populate answer and explanation for all 3 questions × 3 languages.

findings.description: ZH stem variable substitution error: '(X∩Y)' rendered as 'A与B的交集' and '(X∪Y)' as 'A与B的并集'.
findings.detail: JP: 'ここで、(X∩Y)は、XとYの共通部分（積集合）、(X∪Y)は…' — EN correctly keeps '(X ∩ Y)'. ZH incorrectly substitutes the generic variable symbols (X∩Y)/(X∪Y) with instance-specific 'A与B的交集'/'A与B的并集', making the definition clause logically circular.
findings.action: Fix ZH stem: replace 'A与B的交集表示X与Y的公共部分' → '(X∩Y)表示X与Y的公共部分', and 'A与B的并集' → '(X∪Y)'.

findings.description: ZH truth-table column headers are inconsistent: OR/XOR/NOR add inline Chinese terms; AND/NOT/NAND do not.
findings.detail: AND='A AND B', OR='A 逻辑或（OR） B', XOR='A 异或（XOR） B', NOT='NOT A', NAND='A NAND B', NOR='A NOR B（A或非B）'. 3/6 operators annotated, 3/6 not — no consistent style.
findings.action: Standardize ZH table headers: either consistently add Chinese operator names for all 6 operators, or remove all inline annotations.

findings.description: ZH figure captions inconsistent: AND/OR figures use bare 'AND运算'/'OR运算'; XOR/NOT add Chinese term prefix '异或（XOR）运算'/'逻辑非（NOT）运算'.
findings.detail: fig::9 ZH='AND运算（A AND B）', fig::10='OR运算（A OR B）', fig::11='异或（XOR）运算（A XOR B）', fig::12='逻辑非（NOT）运算（NOT A）'
findings.action: Standardize figure caption ZH: either '逻辑与（AND）运算' for all, or bare 'AND运算' for all.

findings.description: Formula surface term '各桁の数字×16^n（nは[桁数-1]）' describes only the max exponent for the highest digit, not the general indexing rule.
findings.detail: The surface gives 'n=[桁数-1]' which is only the n for the most-significant digit. The definition correctly explains 'lowest digit = position 0'. Surface alone is ambiguous for learners. EN surface '(n is [number_of_digits − 1])' has same ambiguity. ZH matches JP.
findings.action: Consider clarifying surface to '各桁の数字×16^n（nは桁位置：最下位=0）' or add parenthetical 'nは0, 1, 2…'.

summary: Chunk 31 (pp.322-331) covers hex conversion, sets/logic (AND/OR/XOR/NOT/NAND/NOR), and data units (bit/byte). Mathematical content is technically CORRECT throughout. Glossary-to-entity surface alignment: PASS (9/9 checked). Critical issue: all 3 questions on p331 have empty answer+explanation fields (F01, HIGH). Semantic error in p331 Q2 ZH stem mixes variable definitions with instance values (F02, MEDIUM). Two LOW-severity ZH style inconsistencies in truth-table headers and figure captions (F03, F04). One LOW-severity formula surface ambiguity in p322 hex formula term (F05). No JP source content errors detected. EN translations are accurate throughout.
